title: mentha aquatica f. purpurea
intro: Mentha aquatica f. purpurea, also known as purple water mint, is a variant of the water mint plant that has purple leaves and is native to Europe and Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as an antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and digestive aid. The health benefits of Mentha aquatica f. purpurea include relief from digestive issues, headaches, and colds, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve respiratory function. The herbal preparations of Mentha aquatica f. purpurea include teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to make topical creams, perfumes, and aromatherapy products.
